display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroen 2CV.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explains our macabre fixation with killing. Hear how real-life crimes in the early 1800s gave society a thirst for murder.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley dissects society's dark obsession with slayings. Hear how science and detection affected the culture of homicide in the Victorian Age.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The critically acclaimed documentary series all about World War II. Hear about the Allied scientists' controversial efforts to develop a new, immensely powerful weapon.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Discover how the superpowers established a new political order at the end of World War II. Laurence Olivier's narration and interviews with statesmen paint a vivid picture.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the iconic, 26-part documentary series about World War II. As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: It's Robbie's toughest trip yet as he battles through water weed on the Bradley Arm and gets stuck in silt on the Ridgacre Branch.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The impact of humans on aquatic wildlife, from albatrosses unwittingly feeding their offspring plastic to communications between animals disrupted by noise.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the oceans that surround the continent's coastline, which are home to more than 60 per cent of the world's marine species.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon begins his journey on the island of Hispaniola and its two very different countries of the Dominican Republic - a tourist hotspot - and its poorer neighbour Haiti.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The second leg of Simon Reeve's journey around the Caribbean Sea takes him from the beautiful island of Barbados to St Vincent and the Grenadines, Venezuela and Colombia.

programme.title: Caribbean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's last leg begins on the remote Caribbean coast of Nicaragua before he encounters extreme violence on the mainland of Honduras and finishes his adventure on Jamaica.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: It's a battle of little and large as the team get creative with a 1996 Fiat 126 and then run their own consumer test on a 2004 Bentley Continental GT.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming encounters a leaky lock pound on the Perry Barr Flight and gets marooned in the mud before travelling under Spaghetti Junction in Birmingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The cherished sitcom with the nation's favourite grumpy old chap, Victor Meldrew. The Meldrews are burgled and receive an unwelcome wedding invitation.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Grumpy old man Victor Meldrew battles against yet more surreal circumstances. Margaret becomes haunted by a chilling nightmare that she will murder Victor.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Why does everyone wind up poor Victor? His brother Alfred pops over after 25 years away in New Zealand. And Victor is left in charge of the neighbour's house.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom about two ill-matched friends, from the writers of Porridge and Auf Wiedersehen Pet. Bob's married life promises work, worry and wallpapering.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish laughs. According to Shakespeare, 'wine is a gentle stimulant and good companion' - and so is Terry on the night Bob gets breathalysed.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: The original men behaving badly. Bob and Terry challenge each other to a cross-country cycle race. Of course, you would expect the wily Terry to cheat - but Bob.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Paul and Dave find a Ford Escort that's been untouched for 30 years.

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series Of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: After losing their parents under tragic circumstances, three orphans are taken in by a conniving count who's determined to steal their inheritance. Stars Jim Carrey. (2004)

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final match in Round 5 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Taxctix host the Stars from Wolfbrook Arena in Christchurch.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon punishes Leonard for a past mistake by making him "walk a mile in his shoes." Meanwhile, Penny confronts Raj's ex-girlfriend, Lucy. S7 E8

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: It’s carnage at the crossroads when one motorist fails to see a red light. A dodgy bike with the VIN ground off has police wondering if the owner knew he was buying stolen property.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando Iannucci causes shock with an ostrich and Joanna Page whispers about guinea pigs.

programme.title: Hansel & Gretel: Witch Hunters
programme.desc: Brother/sister duo Hansel and Gretel are professional witch-hunters who help innocent villagers. One day they stumble upon a case that could hold the key to their past. Stars Jeremy Renner. (2013)

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: After receiving tragic news, Jake refuses to give up on a beloved patient, landing himself in conflict with several Westside surgeons. S2 E8

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: The FBI and LAPD join forces on a covert sting operation to protect Bailey; Wesley and Angela face tensions in their marriage when his campaign is threatened by a public scandal. S8 E12

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Shanika goes down into the shafts to rescue her mum, but is thwarted by the Vampire King. S1 E4

programme.title: Marilyn Manson: Unmasked
programme.desc: Uncover the controversy surrounding notorious rock star Marilyn Manson, from his early days as a symbol of counterculture who shocked the public with his lyrics to the sexual assault allegations.

programme.title: Death On The Beach
programme.desc: When does paradise become a place of no return? Investigate the mysterious deaths of UK citizens abroad, as told by their loved ones back home.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers Ravenhall and Osborne pull over a previously charged drink driver on a hot afternoon. Their initial alcohol test turns up a positive result and the driver awaits the news.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Cash shows a new recruit the ropes. Mali and Abigail clear the air. Alf’s stubbornness comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The legendary duo in their pomp. This episode from 1977 includes the classic Minister for Having Referendums on Absolutely Everything sketch, as well as Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The comedy duo legends at the peak of their powers from 1977 with sketches including The Limerick Writers, and the continuing saga of Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Another slice of the legendary comedy duo. Filmed at the peak of their powers in 1977, this show includes Stop, You're Killing Me, and Ronnie C's regular meandering monologue.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Messrs Barker and Corbett from 1977 with some classic comedy, including Teach Yourself PC, Stop, You're Killing Me, and naturally, their regular hilarious musical skit.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Superb vintage comedy from 1977 with the much-loved duo. The riotous sketches from Messrs Barker and Corbett include their thriller spoof, Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Miranda Krestovnikoff walks along the salt marshes, tidal lagoons and wooded groves of the River Deben in Suffolk as she travels from Sutton Hoo to Ramsholt Quay.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru visit the famously beautiful Welsh canal with a haunted castle en route.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru explore one of the world's great waterways - the River Nile - while travelling from Luxor to Aswan, visiting a Nubian village, and dancing by moonlight.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the Naviglio Grande Canal in Italy, stopping along the way at the Swiss lakeside town of Locarno and the gardens of Isola Bella.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru embark on a voyage through canal history as they explore the waterways of northwest England and heading from Manchester to Ellesmere Port.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru visit the famously beautiful Welsh canal with a haunted castle en route.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru explore one of the world's great waterways - the River Nile - while travelling from Luxor to Aswan, visiting a Nubian village, and dancing by moonlight.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary series. A look at southern Thailand, known for its natural beauty. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the paradise of Thailand. In central Thailand's forests, plains and city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Series exploring the paradise of Thailand. Northern Thailand, dominated by mountains and forests, hides ancient creatures and surprising partnerships.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Witness a rarely seen South American wilderness: Patagonia. Discover the secret lives of pumas and hummingbirds, and soar with condors over glacial peaks.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary series. A look at southern Thailand, known for its natural beauty. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the paradise of Thailand. In central Thailand's forests, plains and city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Series exploring the paradise of Thailand. Northern Thailand, dominated by mountains and forests, hides ancient creatures and surprising partnerships.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Witness a rarely seen South American wilderness: Patagonia. Discover the secret lives of pumas and hummingbirds, and soar with condors over glacial peaks.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary series. A look at southern Thailand, known for its natural beauty. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Thailand: Earth's Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the paradise of Thailand. In central Thailand's forests, plains and city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Rachel's competitive sister Penny and her husband Boyd are coming to stay in their massive new car, so Rachel is keen for the Jessops to project that they're all happy and doing well. S2 E6

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Week By The Sea
programme.desc: Susan is in Barry Island, South Wales, made famous by the sit-com Gavin and Stacey. It's a resort that promises family fun galore. On the promenade Susan meets a gathering of camper vans.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Under attack from a growing number of intruder male lions, the mums with young cubs must find the rest of the pride. Leopard mum Lediba risks it all for a meal.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: A Central Otago vineyard is the breath-taking site for a multi-generational home bringing an extended family back together with the matriarch’s own journey front of mind.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A young Kāpiti couple runs a thriving business shearing and fencing on lifestyle blocks while also taming a run-down farm and saving up to buy one of their own.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: A Hauraki Gulf island with an illustrious history looks to be an idyllic family retreat but building there proves a logistical nightmare.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Season Premiere: When a chef is found dead in a crop circle, alien abduction theories spark as a UFO convention arrives in Brokenwood. S12 E1

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Years after suffering a tragedy, a chance encounter with a young Milo leads Carrie to fixate on the boy. S1 E7

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates an explosion at a suffrage rally attended by Dr Talbot (Claire Goose) and Julia that leads to the death of an unidentified man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a dockworker is assassinated, Murdoch pursues elusive witness Robert Parker and learns anti-union thugs may be involved. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A death at an investment event leads Crabtree to a savvy visionary who happens to be the father he never knew, but Murdoch suspects he may be culpable.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: An adventure in the woods turns scary when Murdoch, Ogden, Higgins and Ruth are stalked by a beast that killed two men. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The case of a murdered man with a collection of unusual stamps gets complicated for Murdoch when another detective is implicated in the crime.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Determined to bolster his income, Higgins moonlights as a cab driver, shuttling drunks, scoundrels, louts and - it appears - a dead passenger.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The superb mystery series starring Martin Shaw and set in 1960s Northumberland. The body of a pop music-loving schoolgirl is found in Pinnock Woods.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. When the father of a young writer is found dead, tension mounts against Travellers.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the mystery series based on the short stories of GK Chesterton. At Hotel Cuba, the dish of the day is death.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. Brown investigates a group of people all seeking to reinvent themselves.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric of the Cotswolds. Brown becomes embroiled in an art heist masterminded by his adversary Flambeau.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When an American PI is arrested for murder, Frank and Lu set off in search of a valuable muscle car.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Lu infiltrates a local slimming club to discover their secrets, but gets more than she bargained for when she realises her sister is a member.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sergeant Goodfellow turns to Father Brown when he witnesses Inspector Mallory frame an innocent man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a skeleton is found bricked up inside the wall of an old house, Murdoch must track down a killer who thought they got away with it.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Mark and Rex must hunt down a key witness against a notorious crime boss before a hired assassin finds him first.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New Year's Eve celebrations are cut short when a masked man stabs a woman in her own home. Jack and the team must uncover his identity before he strikes again.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack's romance with Anna blossoms whilst he and the rest of the team investigate the mysterious death of a cyclist during a race.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Lu infiltrates a local slimming club to discover their secrets, but gets more than she bargained for when she realises her sister is a member.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Brenda finds love at the home of a clock collector, but when the heir to the house is found dead, Father Brown investigates the case.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The case of a murdered man with a collection of unusual stamps gets complicated for Murdoch when another detective is implicated in the crime.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: An adventure in the woods turns scary when Murdoch, Ogden, Higgins and Ruth are stalked by a beast that killed two men. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Determined to bolster his income, Higgins moonlights as a cab driver, shuttling drunks, scoundrels, louts and - it appears - a dead passenger.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After decomposing bodies are found in a field, Murdoch fears a sequential killer targeting men from other cultures.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the death of a factory worker leading a strike, Murdoch suspects plans to unionise may have motivated his killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed psychic Kristina Frye joins the team to help investigate the murder of the leader of an organisation dedicated to eradicating human trafficking.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are on the hunt after a prison van crash frees convicted killer Danny Winters. After tracking the fugitive, Charlie and Rex find themselves held hostage.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie uncovers a web of police corruption when she attempts to clear the name of Al's former NYPD mentor, who is gunned down in an ambush.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After decomposing bodies are found in a field, Murdoch fears a sequential killer targeting men from other cultures.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After the death of a factory worker leading a strike, Murdoch suspects plans to unionise may have motivated his killer.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed psychic Kristina Frye joins the team to help investigate the murder of the leader of an organisation dedicated to eradicating human trafficking.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are on the hunt after a prison van crash frees convicted killer Danny Winters. After tracking the fugitive, Charlie and Rex find themselves held hostage.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Roman Catholic priest spies trouble when Lady Felicia returns to Kembleford from Africa, having split from her lover Benedict Northam. Mark Williams stars.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Carrie uncovers a web of police corruption when she attempts to clear the name of Al's former NYPD mentor, who is gunned down in an ambush.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. When a bride-to-be is killed on her hen party, Goodman tries to unravel the murder.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack's romance with Anna blossoms whilst he and the rest of the team investigate the mysterious death of a cyclist during a race.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Brenda finds love at the home of a clock collector, but when the heir to the house is found dead, Father Brown investigates the case.
